report.summary: Fixed critical FAQ structured data bug affecting 64+ pages, added responsive h1 sizing to 5 new learn pages, and created 7 missing OG images for today's content.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: CRITICAL FIX: generateFAQSchema now accepts both q/a shorthand and question/answer formats — 64+ learn pages had broken FAQ structured data producing undefined values in Google rich results
Fixed combineSchemas to accept variadic arguments (spread operator) matching actual page usage patterns

Added responsive h1 sizing via clamp(28px, 5vw, 48px) to 5 new learn pages: tokenized-gold-guide-2026, amm-liquidity-pools-guide-2026, real-yield-defi-guide-2026, solana-blinks-actions-guide-2026, nftfi-nft-finance-guide-2026
2 pages already had responsive sizing (bitcoin-supply-shock uses Tailwind responsive classes, solana-token-extensions uses rem units)

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/lib/structured-data.ts — FAQItem interface now supports q/a shorthand; generateFAQSchema uses fallback resolution; combineSchemas accepts variadic args
